title: Hinge Health - Digital MSK Clinic
problem: Chronic musculoskeletal conditions require continuous management, but traditional physical therapy is expensive and inconvenient.
solution: Digital MSK clinic combining wearable sensors, app-based exercise therapy, health coaching, and educational content.
technology: Wearable sensors, computer vision motion tracking, digital health coaching, mobile app
ai_type: Computer vision, ML for exercise analysis
regulatory_notes: No FDA clearance needed for wellness/fitness, clinical validation published
varden_fit: HIGH - Digital MSK at scale represents specialty care pathway. Model for orthopedic referral-to-digital-treatment.
notes: Market leader in digital MSK. IPO candidate. Strong model for specialty digital pathway.
